zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Peyton於1616年出生在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，他的父親Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet38歲，母親Lady Jane Calthorpe11613歲。他於1634年與Elizabeth Yelverton在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年10月12日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉可 艾什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Peyton于1616年出生在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet38岁，母亲Lady Jane Calthorpe11613岁。他于1634年与Elizabeth Yelverton在英国諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1683年10月12日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉可 艾什。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Peyton was born in 1616, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet, was 38 and his mother, Lady Jane Calthorpe, was 11613. He married Elizabeth Yelverton in 1634, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 October 1683, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bracon Ash, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Yelverton en 1634, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Peytonが1616年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronetは38歳，母Lady Jane Calthorpeは11613歳であった。1634年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでElizabeth Yelvertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1683年10月12日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラコン アッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Bartholomew The Less, London, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Peyton(이)가 1616년 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Calthorpe(은)는 11613세였다. 그는 1634년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Elizabeth Yelverton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라콘 애시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Peyton nasceu em 1616, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Calthorpe, tinha 11613 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Yelverton em 1634, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1683, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bracon Ash, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Bartholomew The Less, London, Engl: ст бартоломю т лесс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Peyton родился в 1616 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Calthorpe, 11613. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Yelverton в 1634 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 октября 1683 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности бракон аш, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Peyton nació en 1616, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Peyton 2nd Baronet, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Calthorpe, tenía 11613 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Yelverton en 1634, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1683, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Bracon Ash, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
